title: Health border
description:
A new way to complicate your game.
This datapack adds the function of changing the size of the world border from the amount of your health
body:
![logo health border datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k2jTWbKd/images/8afd5bff9410a7cfa711b2c18328e444e9404828.png)
**this data pack is a challenge that you can complete together with friends or yourself**

**Made by Vaseless**

**[🎶Vaseless youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@vaseless/videos)**

# Overview
Health border is a data pack that adds functionality to the border of your world, now when mobs attack you or you take damage in any other way, the barrier will begin to decrease from your amount of health. It is also recommended to play with friends, but the beta version allows only 3 players to play so far






<details>
<summary>Demonstration of all the functionality of the data pack</summary>

 **Boss battle and border move**

![demonstration of boss battle and border move](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k2jTWbKd/images/0d8abf0eddde57b42582d12dde28fed4e5191f06.gif)

 **Multiplayer**

![demonstration of multiplayer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k2jTWbKd/images/97aaa8b047712efe37639b2b1ad6fb07fd19531f.gif) 

**If your friend left the game**

![demonstration If your friend left the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k2jTWbKd/images/52f2d829825908abb6ba71feaaf9e637704bb7a9.gif)

**Reducing the world boundary from damage received**

![demonstration of taking damage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k2jTWbKd/images/fb52c383467a4a0ed9bfe43120e3489789a9f67b.gif)

**When a player dies he loses 1 heart**

![demonstration of loses heart if you die](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k2jTWbKd/images/4167c9d8c653bfe59c1a9aafbe6c8c655118a496.gif)

</details>
